title: Capturing Their Hearts, The Name Is――

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Kyukyu～☆ The Anime movie 『Kyumaru and the 
Seaside Kingdom』 is airing to rave reviews!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
After Kyumaru and his friends are lost at sea, they go on a 
brand new adventure——Everyone, you're all dying to know more, right?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
A grand adventure full of love and courage! 
Together with Ai, we'll have a wonderful time at the theater♪

text_block_list.name: Trendy Horsegirl A
text_block_list.text:
Wah, that's really her, isn't it!? 
Ai-chan is so cute! Her aura is crazy～!

text_block_list.name: Trendy Horsegirl B
text_block_list.text:
Ai-chan, we saw that CM～! 
It made me want to watch the movie too!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Fufuu, thank you! I hope you'll keep cheering me on!

A little while ago we won a pair of Kyumaru dolls from 
a quiz contest. This caught the eye of a top level 
executive, and they asked her to help promote the movie——
choice_data_list: Must be hard to relax with all that attention
Must be hard to relax with all that attention

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy though? 
The more attention and expectations, the more fired up I get.

Aah, what reliable words! 
Really, if I had to ask anyone, it would have to be you……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Oh? Ummm……nice to meet you. You are?

text_block_list.name: Summer Festival Planner
text_block_list.text:
Aah, I'm the one in charge of handling the Summer Festival here…… 
Here's my card.

text_block_list.name: Summer Festival Planner
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, the idol we were planning to have 
perform for the Live next week ended up falling ill——

text_block_list.name: Summer Festival Planner
text_block_list.text:
And suddenly Ai-san, who's been getting popular 
recently makes an appearance, so we would really 
like to ask her to participate……! I beg of you!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
So a substitute for the Summer Live, right? 
——Thank you for the wonderful opportunity. It sounds fun!

That said, the Uma Musume were in the middle of their really important 
summer training camp. The sudden request would be a heavy burden——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Is it okay if I accept?

When she looked at me with those bright eyes, I couldn't stop her—— 
No, I didn't want to. It only took a moment to decide that.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa, haa…… Trainer, the improved menu feels just right! 
But, you can make it harder you know?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
You have that one you were working on late in to the night, 
don't you? Might as well do all of it, don't you think?
choice_data_list: You saw that, huh……Okay, let's do it!
You saw that, huh……Okay, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's our important summer training camp, 
so we have to train so that we don't have any regrets!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Ah～ah～ah～ah～ah～♪

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It feels really nice to be able to sing out loud in such 
a scenic place. It's really refreshing, it's the best!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how about trying to sing too? 
It has a chorus that I want to practice too.

To be honest, it was a little embarrassing for me. I didn't know if 
I could sing a chorus that would match well with Almond Eye, but——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
That's what I want to hear. Then, let's give it a shot! 
——To that place that seemed so far～♪
choice_data_list: With a little push on the back

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: All of our shared memories～♪
choice_data_list: Never let the moment slip away

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
On this beating of my heart, fluttering with joy 
Can't keep it down, no can't hold it back 
Rush of heat and passion, it's not gonna stop～♪

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: YOU AND I!

Summer training camp and preparations for that live performance—— 
We weren't holding back on either. Together we were giving our all.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! When it comes to hydration, I'm already on top of it. 
With some cucumber and sports drinks, I'm all good!
choice_data_list: Good, just watch out for heatstroke
Good, just watch out for heatstroke

text_block_list.text:
It was difficult for Almond Eye to sweat which meant 
her body retained a lot of heat after a workout. We 
needed to be more careful than most during the summer——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. So far I've been fine! I guess you could call it 
the pleasant feeling of mild fatigue? It's really fulfilling.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Like this, we'll see results from this training camp, without a doubt! 
And during the Live, I'll put on the best performance, you'll see!
choice_data_list: Yeah, just one final push then!!
Yeah, just one final push then!!

text_block_list.text:
It was another busy, but fulfilling day with Almond Eye—— 
I almost wished this would never end.
And then, the day of the Live——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
o oh o oh…Oh oh ohhhーー! 
o oh o oh…Oh oh ohhhーー!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(——Just like I thought, it's going great!! 
Giving your all and singing out loud——)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: (I'll light that fire……!!)

text_block_list.name: Spectator Horsegirl A
text_block_list.text:
Haauu～!! 
So cute and cool……Ai-chan is just the best, isn't she!?

text_block_list.name: Spectator Horsegirl B
text_block_list.text: She's too sparkly～! But, I can't——look away……!

Just by looking in to her eyes, everyone was captivated. 
The dazzling Almond Eye would soon take the world by storm——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Don't stop! No, don't stop'til finish!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Everyone-! Thank you for today! 
Being able to see everyone's smiling faces, brings me joy!
choice_data_list: (The crowd cheered and waved their penlights)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer……Yeah, that's right. We——even during training camp, 
and preparations for the Live, we gave it our all)

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: It was so much fun-!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Mmmm～! This is the feeling of accomplishment, isn't!?
choice_data_list: The Live was a huge success!
The Live was a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The Live was a roaring success! 
……Thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Normally, you should have told me to focus on training camp—— 
Or rather, you should be stopping me. But you went along with me.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Really, this is exactly how my trainer should be!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Together with you, there are so many more things I want to take on. 
Because, just like this time, I'm sure they'll all be fun!
choice_data_list: Right……一With you, I'm ready for anything!
Right……一With you, I'm ready for anything!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Right? That's right! 
Once we get back to the academy, why don't we find a new challenge?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Something that'll get us both fired up, something big! 
And then, once we decide on it——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: We'll overcome it for sure!!
